indication: MEKTOVI is a kinase inhibitor indicated in combination with encorafenib, for the treatment of patients with unresectable or metastatic melanoma with a BRAF V600E or V600K mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to binimetinib in combination with encorafenib for the treatment of patients with unresectable or metastatic melanoma with a BRAF V600E or V600K mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test.

document.name: Mektovi (binimetinib) [package insert]. FDA.
